name: CrashErrorReportArgs
summary: Event argument for CER (crash error reporting) tool. It contains options on what to send out with the crash report.

constructors.name: CrashErrorReportArgs(System.Exception)
constructors.summary: Constructs the options class to customize what CER will collect.

properties.name: SendRecordedCommands
properties.summary: Allow Dynamo to send the recorded commands file to the CER system.
